title: fix(automations): guard callback HMAC fallback in strict env
summary: Align automation callback signing with verification so strict environments require the dedicated HMAC secret.
rationale: Moves callback signature generation onto the shared secret resolver, keeps BETTER_AUTH_SECRET as a relaxed-env-only fallback, adds regression coverage for strict and relaxed environments, and adds a static invariant to prevent direct secret fallback logic from reappearing. Closes #76.
